race.comment: Good little race. BELLA VERONA (9) has been a bit of 'believe your eyes' in two runs to date, winning arrogantly by circling the field on debut at Cranbourne, charging home for an unlucky second last time at Caulfield. Love her going to 1600m on the big track. TIPTOP TORI (2) comes here off a big win in the Adelaide Guineas at big odds. Settles back early but winds up late and a big run is expected with Bates up. BERLEMONT (10) has been knocking on the door including a last start fifth over 1600m at Mornington when only 2.5 lengths from the winner. Include. HIMALAYAN (12) lightly raced filly who was beaten a long neck into third last start over 1600m at Caulfield. Racing well and likely to measure up again.
